sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n7567" key="a)nastro/fios" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀνα-στρόφιος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n7567.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">converse,</tr_> of mathematical proportions, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg2032.tlg001:210:15" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Papp.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">210.15</biblScope></bibl>, al.</sense> </entryFree>
